Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-03-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -

DEFENDANT CINDY CHEN'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment. DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHOW THAT SHE DID NOT RECEIVE NOTICE OF THE SUMMONS OR COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT FAILED TO DEFEND THE ACTION AFTER RECEIVING A NOTICE OF DEFAULT. THE MOTION IS FURTHER UNTIMELY IF BROUGHT UNDER CCP SECTION 473.5. THE MOTION WOULD ALSO BE DENIED UNDER CCP SECTION 1008, MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION, AS UNTIMELY AND LACKING NEW FACTS OR CIRCUMSTANCES. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797 (302/CWW)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Sep-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CINDY CHEN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT. Appearances: James Cai, Esq. of Schein & Cai LLP (408)4360789, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Cindy Chen, Defendant in Pro Per, (212 755-8880, Appearing thru CourtCall, and moving party. Argued and the Court vacates its tentative ruling and rules as follows: Motion denied without prejudice. Defendant did not comply with CCP section 2015.5. Defendant Chen did not provide proof of service. Plaintiff's counsel to prepare Order. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-26-2009 Continued To Sep-15-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CINDY CHEN MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Appearances: Defendant Cindy Chen, (212) 755-8880, Appearing thru CourtCall. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Continued to September 15, 2009. Moving party to provide courtesy copy of moving papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-07-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

James Cai, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Chun Hong Luo, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Beauty Beauty USA, Inc., Wyan Wang or Cindy Chen.
Defaults were entered against defendants Wyan Wang and Cindy Chen on October 7, 2008.
Amended default was entered against defendant Beauty Beauty USA, Inc. on May 12, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 10, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Chun Hong Luo, and against the Defaulted Defendants Beauty Beauty USA, Inc., Wyan Wang and Cindy Chen as follows:

Damages/Principal - $221,100.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,687.64.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $620.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $225,407.64.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
